title: Zoto Eval Runner Params Payload
description: JSON Schema for the typed payload passed from the harness to a `.test.ts` runner's default-export function. Mirrors the `RunnerParams` TypeScript interface exported from `evals/llm/_shared/runner-params.ts`. Runner authors implement `RunnerFn = (params: RunnerParams) => Promise<RunnerResult>`; this schema is the on-the-wire contract that lets JSON tooling (case files, manifest tooling, future remote-runner bridges) statically validate the payload shape without importing the TS types. The `context` block surfaces harness internals (SDK bridge, sandbox helper, model ids, reporter) and is intentionally typed as a free-form object here — the TS contract is the source of truth for its fields.

targetId.description: Target identifier for the suite this case belongs to (matches the `target_id` field on the eval JSON file, e.g. `command:z-eval-update` or `agent:zoto-eval-comparer`).

caseId.description: Case identifier within the eval file. Stringified when the underlying JSON used an integer id.

parameters.description: Free-form payload mirrored verbatim from `case.parameters`. The runner module is responsible for validating its own shape — schema-level only requires that it is an object.

context.description: Harness context (SDK bridge, sandbox helper, model ids, reporter, expect, agent factory). Optional in the JSON Schema because callers may invoke a runner in isolation without the full harness context (e.g. unit-testing the runner itself). The runtime contract is owned by `RunnerContext` in `evals/llm/_shared/runner-params.ts`.
